items: Heriberto Hernández homered 2 times, driving in 3 as Miami beat Washington, 7-3.
Carson Benge homered 2 times, driving in 3 in Seattle's 8-3 win over The Mets.
Spencer Steer homered 2 times as Cincinnati beat Kansas City, 4-3.
Noah Cameron held down Cincinnati for 7.0 innings, striking out 8 in Kansas City's 4-3 win.
Kyle Harrison struck out 12 in 5.2 innings as Milwaukee topped San Francisco, 8-3.
Detroit pitching combined to shut out Tampa Bay, 8-0.
Jac Caglianone, Bobby Witt Jr. combined for 3 stolen bases.
Nico Hoerner, Armstrong combined for 3 stolen bases.
Philadelphia walked off San Diego, 3-2 — one of 3 one-run finishes across the league.
